summary: Frontend UI Testing - Card Alignment & Feed Photo Layout. All features verified working: Collection grid has gridAutoRows 1fr, RecordCard has proper flex classes, min-h containers, mt-auto button. Feed cards have two-column flex justify-between layout with PhotoLightbox integration.

issues: Console warnings: '<a> cannot contain a nested <a>' and '<button> cannot contain nested <button>' - hydration warnings but not affecting functionality

passed_tests: RecordCard: Has 'w-full h-full flex flex-col' classes
RecordCard: Title container has min-h-[2.5rem] (40px computed)
RecordCard: Artist container has min-h-[1.25rem] (20px computed)
RecordCard: Spin Now button parent has mt-auto pt-1 classes
RecordCard: Cards have uniform height across rows (367.7px verified)
NowSpinningCard: Has flex justify-between items-start gap-3 layout (line 313)
NowSpinningCard: Text container uses 'flex-1 mr-2' when photo exists, 'w-full' otherwise (line 315)
NowSpinningCard: Photo thumb has w-20 h-20 sm:w-24 sm:h-24 rounded-lg cursor-pointer classes
NowSpinningCard: PhotoLightbox integrated, opens on thumb click
NewHaulCard: Has flex justify-between layout for bundle and manual haul cards
Now Spinning Modal: 'Add a photo' button present with data-testid='spin-photo-upload-btn'
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about nested <a> and <button> elements causing hydration errors - consider refactoring to avoid nesting interactive elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card alignment features fully implemented. Collection grid uses gridAutoRows: 1fr for uniform row heights. RecordCard has w-full h-full flex flex-col with min-h containers for title/artist and mt-auto for Spin Now button. Feed cards (NowSpinningCard, NewHaulCard) implement two-column photo layout using flex justify-between - text on left (flex-1 mr-2 when photo exists, w-full otherwise), photo on right (w-20/24 h-20/24 rounded-lg cursor-pointer). PhotoLightbox opens on photo click. No photos currently uploaded in feed so photo thumbs don't appear, but conditional rendering verified correct.

implementation: RecordCard: w-full h-full flex flex-col on Card (line 1348)
Spin Now button: mt-auto pt-1 for bottom alignment (line 1483)
NowSpinningCard: Text width conditional - flex-1 mr-2 or w-full (line 315)
NowSpinningCard: Photo thumb w-20 h-20 sm:w-24 sm:h-24 rounded-lg cursor-pointer (line 361)
NewHaulCard: Same two-column layout for bundle and manual haul cards
PhotoLightbox: Integrated in both card types, opens on thumb click
